compiled_state.title: Implement ticket_reducer/marker.py module (write_marker, remove_marker, check_marker with fcntl.flock) and re-export from __init__.py
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## What
Create plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer/marker.py with three public functions for .archived marker I/O. Re-export from ticket_reducer/__init__.py. This is the implementation task for the RED tests written in the preceding task.

## Implementation details

### marker.py functions

write_marker(ticket_dir: str) -> None:
  - Acquires per-ticket fcntl.flock on <ticket_dir>/.write.lock (create if absent, LOCK_EX timeout 10s)
  - Creates <ticket_dir>/.archived as an empty file
  - Releases flock
  - On any OSError: log warning to stderr (f"WARNING: failed to write .archived marker for {ticket_dir}") and return — do NOT raise. Failed marker write must not prevent callers from proceeding.

remove_marker(ticket_dir: str) -> None:
  - Acquires per-ticket fcntl.flock on <ticket_dir>/.write.lock (LOCK_EX timeout 10s)
  - Removes <ticket_dir>/.archived if it exists (idempotent: no error if absent)
  - Releases flock
  - On OSError: log warning to stderr and return — do NOT raise.

check_marker(ticket_dir: str) -> bool:
  - Returns os.path.exists(os.path.join(ticket_dir, '.archived'))
  - No flock needed (reads are naturally consistent for existence checks)

### __init__.py
Add to imports and __all__:
  from ticket_reducer.marker import check_marker, remove_marker, write_marker

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer/marker.py (CREATE)
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer/__init__.py (MODIFY — add re-exports)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] marker.py exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer/marker.py
- [ ] write_marker, remove_marker, check_marker are importable from ticket_reducer
  Verify: python3 -c "from ticket_reducer import write_marker, remove_marker, check_marker; print('ok')" 2>&1 | grep -q ok
- [ ] RED tests from preceding task now pass
  Verify: python3 -m pytest $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer_marker.py -v
- [ ] ruff lint passes on new files
  Verify: ruff check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer/marker.py
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0 (full suite passes)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
